draft_fallback.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my interest in this opportunity. My background includes relevant technical skills and hands-on project experience that align well with your requirements.

I am confident in my ability to contribute meaningfully to your team and would welcome the chance to discuss how my experience can support your goals.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
